title: ItsUpToYou
description: A modpack i made because i was bored.
body:
WARNING: BIG FPS BOOST INCOMING! (Probably)

# Why did i create this?
This mod was created for my own so i dont have to search for each mod i use for every new version, also for those people that are like me (lazy). But the main reason is that i was bored by doing the same thing over and over again with each new version so, i created this.

# Features of the mod.
Most of this mod is pure performance!

This Modpack has 2 ResourcePacks, the first one is Fresh Animations.
(Adds fresh animations to almost all the in-game mobs).

And the seccond one is Fresh Moves.
(This ResourcePack adds few animations for the Player for example the eyes and the head, constantly moving so it feels more.. Alive to say the less).
